uri.description: The URI of this Topic Endpoint Template object.

ackedMsgCount.description:
The number of guaranteed messages delivered and acknowledged by the consumer.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

activityState.description:
The activity state of the Flow. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only". The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"active-browser" - The Flow is active as a browser.
"active-consumer" - The Flow is active as a consumer.
"inactive" - The Flow is inactive.

bindTime.description:
The timestamp of when the Flow bound to the Topic Endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

clientName.description:
The name of the Client.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

consumerRedeliveryRequestAllowed.description:
Indicates whether redelivery requests can be received as negative acknowledgments (NACKs) from the consumer. Applicable only to REST consumers.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

cutThroughAckedMsgCount.description:
The number of guaranteed messages that used cut-through delivery and are acknowledged by the consumer.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

deliveryState.description:
The delivery state of the Flow. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only". The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"closed" - The Flow is unbound.
"opened" - The Flow is bound but inactive.
"unbinding" - The Flow received an unbind request.
"handshaking" - The Flow is handshaking to become active.
"deliver-cut-through" - The Flow is streaming messages using direct+guaranteed delivery.
"deliver-from-input-stream" - The Flow is streaming messages using guaranteed delivery.
"deliver-from-memory" - The Flow throttled causing message delivery from memory (RAM).
"deliver-from-spool" - The Flow stalled causing message delivery from spool (ADB or disk).

flowId.description:
The identifier (ID) of the Flow.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

highestAckPendingMsgId.description:
The highest identifier (ID) of message transmitted and waiting for acknowledgment.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

lastAckedMsgId.description:
The identifier (ID) of the last message transmitted and acknowledged by the consumer.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

lowestAckPendingMsgId.description:
The lowest identifier (ID) of message transmitted and waiting for acknowledgment.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

maxUnackedMsgsExceededMsgCount.description:
The number of guaranteed messages that exceeded the maximum number of delivered unacknowledged messages.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

msgVpnName.description:
The name of the Message VPN.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

noLocalDelivery.description:
Indicates whether not to deliver messages to a consumer that published them.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

redeliveredMsgCount.description:
The number of guaranteed messages that were redelivered.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

redeliveryRequestCount.description:
The number of consumer requests via negative acknowledgments (NACKs) to redeliver guaranteed messages.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

sessionName.description:
The name of the Transacted Session for the Flow.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

storeAndForwardAckedMsgCount.description:
The number of guaranteed messages that used store and forward delivery and are acknowledged by the consumer.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

topicEndpointName.description:
The name of the Topic Endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

transportRetransmitMsgCount.description:
The number of guaranteed messages that were retransmitted at the transport layer as part of a single delivery attempt.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only". Available since 2.18.

unackedMsgCount.description:
The number of guaranteed messages delivered but not yet acknowledged by the consumer.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

usedWindowSize.description:
The number of guaranteed messages using the available window size.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

windowClosedCount.description:
The number of times the window for guaranteed messages was filled and closed before an acknowledgment was received.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

windowSize.description:
The number of outstanding guaranteed messages that can be transmitted over the Flow before an acknowledgment is received.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

uri.description: The URI of this Topic Endpoint Transmit Flow object.

clientId.description:
The identifier (ID) of the Client.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

clientName.description:
The name of the Client.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

clientUsername.description:
The username of the Client.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

idleTimeout.description:
The number of seconds before an idle Transaction may be automatically rolled back and freed.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

msgVpnName.description:
The name of the Message VPN.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

replicated.description:
Indicates whether the Transaction is replicated.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

sessionName.description:
The name of the Transacted Session for the Transaction.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

state.description:
The state of the Transaction. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only". The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"active" - The Transaction was started.
"suspended" - The Transaction was suspended.
"idle" - The Transaction was ended.
"prepared" - The Transaction was prepared.
"complete" - The Transaction was committed or rolled back.

timeInState.description:
The number of seconds the Transaction has remained in the current state.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

type.description:
The type of Transaction. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only". The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"xa" - The Transaction is an XA Transaction.
"local" - The Transaction is a local Transaction.

xid.description:
The identifier (ID) of the Transaction.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

count.description: The total number of objects in the consumerMsgs collection.
The total number of objects in the publisherMsgs collection.

endpointName.description:
The name of the Queue or Topic Endpoint source.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

endpointType.description:
The type of endpoint source. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only". The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"queue" - The Message is from a Queue.
"topic-endpoint" - The Message is from a Topic Endpoint.

msgId.description:
The identifier (ID) of the Message.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

msgVpnName.description:
The name of the Message VPN.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

replicationGroupMsgId.description:
An ID that uniquely identifies this message within this replication group.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only". Available since 2.21.

xid.description:
The identifier (ID) of the Transaction.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

uri.description: The URI of this Transaction Consumer Message object.

consumerMsgsUri.description: The URI of this Replicated Local Transaction or XA Transaction's collection of Transaction Consumer Message objects.

publisherMsgsUri.description: The URI of this Replicated Local Transaction or XA Transaction's collection of Transaction Publisher Message objects.

uri.description: The URI of this Replicated Local Transaction or XA Transaction object.

msgId.description:
The identifier (ID) of the Message.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

msgVpnName.description:
The name of the Message VPN.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

topic.description:
The topic destination of the Message.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

xid.description:
The identifier (ID) of the Transaction.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "vpn/read-only".

uri.description: The URI of this Transaction Publisher Message object.

accessLevelGroupsClaimName.description:
The name of the groups claim.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

accessLevelGroupsClaimStringFormat.description:
The format of the access level groups claim value when it is a string. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.) The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"single" - When the claim is a string, it is interpreted as as single group.
"space-delimited" - When the claim is a string, it is interpreted as a space-delimited list of groups, similar to the "scope" claim.
Available since 2.32.

active.description:
Indicates whether the profile is active. An enabled profile may not be active if discovery is not complete, if there is no issuer specified, or if there is another profile with the same issuer.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". Available since 2.26.

authenticationClientCertConfigTime.description:
The timestamp of when the client-certificate was configured. This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time). Available since 2.47.

authenticationClientCertThumbprint.description:
The thumbprint of the client-certificate.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". Available since 2.47.

authenticationScheme.description:
The authentication scheme for token and introspection requests. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.) The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"basic" - Basic Authentication Scheme (via client id and client secret).
"client-certificate" - Client Certificate Authentication Scheme (via certificate file or content).
Available since 2.47.

clientId.description:
The OAuth client id.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

clientRedirectUri.description:
The OAuth redirect URI.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

clientRequiredType.description:
The required value for the TYP field in the ID token header.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

clientScope.description:
The OAuth scope.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

clientValidateTypeEnabled.description:
Enable or disable verification of the TYP field in the ID token header.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

completeExpiredStateCount.description:
The number of requests to the broker OAuth completion endpoint with an expired state token.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

completeInvalidStateCount.description:
The number of request to the broker OAuth completion endpoint with an invalid state token.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

completeRequestCount.description:
The number of requests to the broker OAuth completion endpoint (successful and unsuccessful).

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

completeSuccessCount.description:
The number of successful requests to the broker OAuth completion endpoint.  Successful requests have authenticated  the user and established a browser session.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

defaultGlobalAccessLevel.description:
The default global access level for this OAuth profile. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.) The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"none" - User has no access to global data.
"read-only" - User has read-only access to global data.
"mesh-manager" - User has read-write access to global data required to administer this broker as a member of a mesh of brokers.
"read-write" - User has read-write access to most global data.
"admin" - User has read-write access to all global data.

defaultMsgVpnAccessLevel.description:
The default message VPN access level for the OAuth profile. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.) The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"none" - User has no access to a Message VPN.
"read-only" - User has read-only access to a Message VPN.
"read-write" - User has read-write access to most Message VPN settings.

discoveryLastRefreshFailureReason.description:
The reason for the last discovery endpoint refresh failure.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

discoveryLastRefreshFailureTime.description:
The timestamp of the last discovery endpoint refresh failure.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

discoveryLastRefreshTime.description:
The timestamp of the last discovery endpoint refresh success.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

discoveryNextScheduledRefreshTime.description:
The timestamp of the next scheduled discovery endpoint refresh.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

discoveryRefreshFailureCount.description:
The number of discovery endpoint refresh failures.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

displayName.description:
The user friendly name for the OAuth profile.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

enabled.description:
Enable or disable the OAuth profile.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointAuthorization.description:
The OAuth authorization endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointAuthorizationOperational.description:
The operational OAuth authorization endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

endpointDiscovery.description:
The OpenID Connect discovery endpoint or OAuth Authorization Server Metadata endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointDiscoveryRefreshInterval.description:
The number of seconds between discovery endpoint requests.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointIntrospection.description:
The OAuth introspection endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointIntrospectionOperational.description:
The operational OAuth introspection endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

endpointIntrospectionTimeout.description:
The maximum time in seconds a token introspection request is allowed to take.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointJwks.description:
The OAuth JWKS endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointJwksOperational.description:
The operational OAuth JWKS endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

endpointJwksRefreshInterval.description:
The number of seconds between JWKS endpoint requests.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointToken.description:
The OAuth token endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointTokenOperational.description:
The operational OAuth token endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

endpointTokenTimeout.description:
The maximum time in seconds a token request is allowed to take.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointUserinfo.description:
The OpenID Connect Userinfo endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

endpointUserinfoOperational.description:
The operational OpenID Connect Userinfo endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

endpointUserinfoTimeout.description:
The maximum time in seconds a userinfo request is allowed to take.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

inactiveReason.description:
The reason the profile is not active. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"profile-disabled" - The OAuth profile is disabled.
"missing-issuer" - The issuer has not been discovered or configured.
"duplicate-issuer" - Another OAuth profile already has the same issuer.
"none" - The OAuth profile is active.
Available since 2.26.

initiateInvalidErrorLinkCount.description:
The number of requests to the broker OAuth initiation endpoint that had an invalid error_link_uri parameter.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

initiateInvalidHostCount.description:
The number of requests to the broker OAuth initiation endpoint that did not have a valid Host header.  See the Allowed Host configuration setting.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

initiateInvalidTargetLinkCount.description:
The number of requests to the broker OAuth initiation endpoint that had an invalid target_link_uri parameter.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

initiateRequestCount.description:
The number of requests to the broker OAuth initiation endpoint (successful and unsuccessful).

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

initiateSuccessCount.description:
The number of requests to the broker OAuth initiation endpoint that successfully redirected to the OAuth provider's authorization endpoint.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveEnabled.description:
Enable or disable interactive logins via this OAuth provider.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

interactiveGroupsFoundInTokenCount.description:
The number of times the groups were successfully found in the ID token or access token for interactive authentication.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveIntrospectionMissingCount.description:
The number of failures during interactive authentication due to missing introspection configuration (a introspection request was required but no introspection endpoint was configured).

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveIntrospectionMissingGroupsCou.description:
The number of introspection request made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile  where the configured groups claim wasn't found in the access token or the introspection response.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveIntrospectionMissingUsernameC.description:
The number of introspection requests made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile where the configured username claim wasn't found in the access token or introspection response.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveIntrospectionRequestCount.description:
The number of requests made to the introspection endpoint during interactive authentication.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveIntrospectionResponseInvalidC.description:
The number of introspection responses during interactive authentication that couldn't be parsed.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveIntrospectionStatusOkCount.description:
The number of introspection requests made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile with 200 status responses.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveIntrospectionStatusOtherCount.description:
The number of introspection requests made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile with status responses other than 200.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveIntrospectionTokenNotActiveCo.description:
The number of introspection responses indicating that the provided token was not active.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactivePromptForExpiredSession.description:
The value of the prompt parameter provided to the OAuth authorization server for login requests where the session has expired.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

interactivePromptForNewSession.description:
The value of the prompt parameter provided to the OAuth authorization server for login requests where the session is new or the user has explicitly logged out.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

interactiveUserinfoMissingCount.description:
The number of failures due to missing Userinfo configuration (a Userinfo request was required but no Userinfo endpoint was configured) during interactive authentication.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveUserinfoMissingGroupsCount.description:
The number of Userinfo request made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile where the configured groups claim wasn't found in the ID token or the Userinfo response.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveUserinfoMissingUsernameCount.description:
The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile where the configured username claim wasn't found in the ID token or Userinfo response.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveUserinfoRequestCount.description:
The number of requests made to the Userinfo endpoint during interactive authentication.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveUserinfoResponseInvalidCount.description:
The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile with responses that couldn't be parsed.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveUserinfoStatusOkCount.description:
The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile with 200 status responses.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveUserinfoStatusOtherCount.description:
The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile with status responses other than 200.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveUserinfoSubjectMismatchCount.description:
The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during interactive authentication for this OAuth profile with subject claims that did not match the subject from the ID token.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

interactiveUsernameFoundInTokenCount.description:
The number of time the username was successfully found in the ID token or access token for interactive authentication.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

introspectionAverageTime.description:
The one minute average of the time required to complete a token introspection, in milliseconds (ms).

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

introspectionLastFailureReason.description:
The reason for the introspection endpoint request failure.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

introspectionLastFailureTime.description:
The timestamp of the last introspection endpoint request failure.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

issuer.description:
The Issuer Identifier for the OAuth provider.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

issuerOperational.description:
The operational Issuer Identifier for the OAuth provider.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

jwksLastRefreshFailureReason.description:
The reason for the last JWKS public key refresh failure.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

jwksLastRefreshFailureTime.description:
The timestamp of the last JWKS public key refresh failure.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

jwksLastRefreshTime.description:
The timestamp of the last JWKS public key refresh success.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

jwksNextScheduledRefreshTime.description:
The timestamp of the next scheduled JWKS public key refresh.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

jwksRefreshFailureCount.description:
The number of JWKS public key refresh failures.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

oauthProfileName.description:
The name of the OAuth profile.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

oauthRole.description:
The OAuth role of the broker. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.) The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"client" - The broker is in the OAuth client role.
"resource-server" - The broker is in the OAuth resource server role.

proxyName.description:
The name of the proxy to use for discovery, user info, jwks, introspection, and token requests. Leave empty for no proxy.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

 Available since 2.41.

resourceServerParseAccessTokenEnabled.description:
Enable or disable parsing of the access token as a JWT.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

resourceServerRequiredAudience.description:
The required audience value.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

resourceServerRequiredIssuer.description:
The required issuer value.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

resourceServerRequiredScope.description:
A space-separated list of scopes that must be present in the scope claim.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

resourceServerRequiredType.description:
The required TYP value.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

resourceServerValidateAudienceEnabled.description:
Enable or disable verification of the audience claim in the access token or introspection response.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

resourceServerValidateIssuerEnabled.description:
Enable or disable verification of the issuer claim in the access token or introspection response.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

resourceServerValidateScopeEnabled.description:
Enable or disable verification of the scope claim in the access token or introspection response.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

resourceServerValidateTypeEnabled.description:
Enable or disable verification of the TYP field in the access token header.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

sempEnabled.description:
Enable or disable authentication of SEMP requests with OAuth tokens.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.)

sempExpiredTokenCount.description:
The number of SEMP requests with an expired OAuth token.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

sempGroupsFoundInTokenCount.description:

sempIntrospectionStatusOtherCount.description:
The number of introspection requests made from the broker during SEMP request authentication for this OAuth profile with status responses other than 200.

sempIntrospectionTokenNotActiveCount.description:

sempInvalidTokenCount.description:
The number of SEMP requests with an invalid OAuth token.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

sempRequestCount.description:
The number of SEMP requests (successful and unsuccessful) using this OAuth profile.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

sempSuccessCount.description:

The number of Userinfo request made from the broker during SEMP request authentication for this OAuth profile where the configured groups claim wasn't found in the ID token or the Userinfo response.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

sempUserinfoMissingUsernameCount.description:
The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during SEMP request authentication for this OAuth profile where the configured username claim wasn't found in the ID token or Userinfo response.

The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during SEMP request authentication for this OAuth profile with responses that couldn't be parsed.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

sempUserinfoStatusOkCount.description:
The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during SEMP request authentication for this OAuth profile with 200 status responses.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

sempUserinfoStatusOtherCount.description:
The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during SEMP request authentication for this OAuth profile with status responses other than 200.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

sempUserinfoSubjectMismatchCount.description:
The number of Userinfo requests made from the broker during SEMP request authentication for this OAuth profile with subject claims that did not match the subject from the ID token.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

sempUsernameFoundInTokenCount.description:
The number of time the username was successfully found in the ID token or access token for SEMP request authentication.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

tokenEndpointAverageTime.description:
The one minute average of the time required to complete a token request, in milliseconds (ms).

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

tokenEndpointInvalidTokenCount.description:
The number of token endpoint requests made from the broker for this OAuth profile that returned tokens that couldn't be verified.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

tokenEndpointLastFailureReason.description:
The reason for the last token endpoint request failure.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only".

tokenEndpointLastFailureTime.description:
The timestamp of the last token endpoint request failure.

The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". This value represents the number of seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC (Unix time).

globalAccessLevel.description:
The global access level for this group. The minimum access scope/level required to retrieve this attribute is "global/read-only". (This description is taken from the corresponding attribute in the configuration API.) The allowed values and their meaning are: 
"none" - User has no access to global data.
"read-only" - User has read-only access to global data.
"mesh-manager" - User has read-write access to global data required to administer this broker as a member of a mesh of brokers.
"read-write" - User has read-write access to most global data.
"admin" - User has read-write access to all global data.

"read-write" - User has read-write access to most Message VPN settings.

code.description: The error code which uniquely identifies the error that has occurred.

description.description: The verbose description of the problem.

status.description: The terse status string associated with `code`.

count.description:
The total number of objects requested, irrespective of page size. This may be a count of all objects in a collection or a filtered subset. It represents a snapshot in time and may change when paging through results.

This attribute is only supported for [specific collections](https://docs.solace.com/Admin/SEMP/SEMP-Features.htm#retrieving-the-number-of-objects-in-a-collection).

responseCode.description: The HTTP response code, one of 200 (success), 4xx (client error), or 5xx (server error).

cursorQuery.description: The cursor, or position, for the next page of objects. Use this as the `cursor` query parameter of the next request.

nextPageUri.description: The URI of the next page of objects. `cursorQuery` is already embedded within this URI.

method.description: The HTTP method of the request which resulted in this response.

uri.description: The URI of the request which resulted in this response. The URI may be normalized.

countQuery.name: count
countQuery.description: Limit the count of objects in the response. See the documentation for the `count` parameter.

cursorQuery.name: cursor
cursorQuery.description: The cursor, or position, for the next page of objects. See the documentation for the `cursor` parameter.

selectQuery.name: select
selectQuery.description: Include in the response only selected attributes of the object, or exclude from the response selected attributes of the object. See the documentation for the `select` parameter.

whereQuery.name: where
whereQuery.description: Include in the response only objects where certain conditions are true. See the the documentation for the `where` parameter.
